steps.title: Spot the command
steps.content: Lady Britomart commands Stephen: “You must assume the responsibility.” The context reveals the target meaning: to take on or accept a duty.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Undertake—to take on—expresses exactly this action. Infer and Presuppose are mental operations unrelated to accepting responsibility; Mimic is nonsensical. That matches choice C — C is correct.
